has_belgian_nationality.name: has_belgian_nationality
has_belgian_nationality.description: The person possesses Belgian nationality (directly assertable background status).

is_alien.name: is_alien
is_alien.description: The person is an alien: they do not provide proof of Belgian nationality.

is_union_citizen.name: is_union_citizen
is_union_citizen.description: The person is a Union citizen.

enjoys_community_free_movement_right.name: enjoys_community_free_movement_right
enjoys_community_free_movement_right.description: The person enjoys the Community right of free movement as defined in Article 2, point 5, of the Schengen Borders Code.

is_third_country_national.name: is_third_country_national
is_third_country_national.description: The person is a third-country national: not a Union citizen and not enjoying the Community right of free movement.

meets_entry_or_stay_conditions.name: meets_entry_or_stay_conditions
meets_entry_or_stay_conditions.description: The person meets the conditions for entry to or stay on the territory.

present_on_territory.name: present_on_territory
present_on_territory.description: The person is present on the territory.

is_in_illegal_stay.name: is_in_illegal_stay
is_in_illegal_stay.description: The person is in illegal stay: present on the territory without meeting entry or stay conditions.

subject_to_removal_procedure.name: subject_to_removal_procedure
subject_to_removal_procedure.description: The person is the subject of a removal procedure.

subject_to_international_protection_proc.name: subject_to_international_protection_procedure
subject_to_international_protection_proc.description: The person is the subject of a procedure for the granting of international protection.

subject_to_responsible_member_state_dete.name: subject_to_responsible_member_state_determination_procedure
subject_to_responsible_member_state_dete.description: The person is the subject of a procedure for the determination of or transfer to the Member State responsible for examining the application for international protection.

eligible_for_risk_of_absconding_assessme.name: eligible_for_risk_of_absconding_assessment
eligible_for_risk_of_absconding_assessme.description: The person is subject to a removal procedure, international protection procedure, or responsible Member State determination procedure, making a risk of absconding assessment possible.

individual_examination_performed.name: individual_examination_performed
individual_examination_performed.description: An individual examination of the person has been performed for the purpose of assessing risk of absconding.

risk_of_absconding_is_current_and_real.name: risk_of_absconding_is_current_and_real
risk_of_absconding_is_current_and_real.description: The risk of absconding for the person is current and real.

has_risk_of_absconding.name: has_risk_of_absconding
has_risk_of_absconding.description: A risk of absconding exists for the person based on individual examination and objective criteria.

possesses_valid_travel_document.name: possesses_valid_travel_document
possesses_valid_travel_document.description: The person is in possession of a valid travel document, valid passport, or valid identity document.

recognised_as_national_by_own_country_au.name: recognised_as_national_by_own_country_authority
recognised_as_national_by_own_country_au.description: The person has been recognised as a national by the national authority of their country, and that authority has declared itself willing to issue a laissez-passer.

falls_within_laissez_passer_nationality_.name: falls_within_laissez_passer_nationality_category
falls_within_laissez_passer_nationality_.description: The person falls within the category of nationalities for which the minister may personally issue a laissez-passer.

is_identified_alien.name: is_identified_alien
is_identified_alien.description: The person is an identified alien under one of the three identification criteria.

absconding_criterion_1_met.name: absconding_criterion_1_met
absconding_criterion_1_met.description: Absconding criterion 1 is met: the person did not submit a residence application after illegal entry or during illegal stay, or did not make an international protection application within the statutory time limit.

no_residence_application_after_illegal_e.name: no_residence_application_after_illegal_entry_or_stay
no_residence_application_after_illegal_e.description: The person did not submit a residence application following their illegal entry or during their illegal stay.

no_international_protection_application_.name: no_international_protection_application_within_time_limit
no_international_protection_application_.description: The person did not make their application for international protection within the time limit provided for by the Act.

absconding_criterion_2_met.name: absconding_criterion_2_met
absconding_criterion_2_met.description: Absconding criterion 2 is met: the person used false or misleading information, false or falsified documents, or committed fraud or other unlawful means in a relevant procedure.

used_false_or_misleading_information_in_.name: used_false_or_misleading_information_in_procedure
used_false_or_misleading_information_in_.description: The person used false or misleading information in a procedure for international protection, residence, removal, or refusal of entry.

used_false_or_falsified_documents_in_pro.name: used_false_or_falsified_documents_in_procedure
used_false_or_falsified_documents_in_pro.description: The person used false or falsified documents in a procedure for international protection, residence, removal, or refusal of entry.

committed_fraud_or_unlawful_means_in_pro.name: committed_fraud_or_unlawful_means_in_procedure
committed_fraud_or_unlawful_means_in_pro.description: The person committed fraud or used other unlawful means in a procedure for international protection, residence, removal, or refusal of entry.

absconding_criterion_3_met.name: absconding_criterion_3_met
absconding_criterion_3_met.description: Absconding criterion 3 is met: the person does not cooperate or has not cooperated with authorities responsible for access, residence, establishment, and removal regulations.

failed_to_cooperate_with_authorities.name: failed_to_cooperate_with_authorities
failed_to_cooperate_with_authorities.description: The person does not cooperate or has not cooperated with the authorities responsible for implementation of or supervision of compliance with regulations concerning access, residence, establishment, and removal of aliens.

absconding_criterion_4_met.name: absconding_criterion_4_met
absconding_criterion_4_met.description: Absconding criterion 4 is met: the person has indicated unwillingness to comply with or has failed to comply with a transfer, refusal of entry, removal measure, entry ban, less coercive measure, liberty-restricting measure, or equivalent measure by another Member State.

non_compliant_with_transfer_refusal_or_r.name: non_compliant_with_transfer_refusal_or_removal_measure
non_compliant_with_transfer_refusal_or_r.description: The person has made clear they do not wish to comply with, or has already failed to comply with, a transfer, refusal of entry, or removal measure.

non_compliant_with_entry_ban.name: non_compliant_with_entry_ban
non_compliant_with_entry_ban.description: The person has made clear they do not wish to comply with, or has already failed to comply with, an entry ban that has neither been lifted nor suspended.

non_compliant_with_less_coercive_measure.name: non_compliant_with_less_coercive_measure
non_compliant_with_less_coercive_measure.description: The person has made clear they do not wish to comply with, or has already failed to comply with, a less coercive measure than deprivation of liberty aimed at guaranteeing transfer, refusal of entry, or removal.

non_compliant_with_liberty_restricting_m.name: non_compliant_with_liberty_restricting_measure_for_public_order
non_compliant_with_liberty_restricting_m.description: The person has made clear they do not wish to comply with, or has already failed to comply with, a liberty-restricting measure aimed at guaranteeing public order or national security.

non_compliant_with_equivalent_measure_by.name: non_compliant_with_equivalent_measure_by_other_member_state
non_compliant_with_equivalent_measure_by.description: The person has made clear they do not wish to comply with, or has already failed to comply with, a measure taken by another Member State equivalent to those listed in criterion 4(a) through 4(d).

absconding_criterion_5_met.name: absconding_criterion_5_met
absconding_criterion_5_met.description: Absconding criterion 5 is met: the person is subject to an entry ban in the Kingdom or another Member State that has neither been lifted nor suspended.

subject_to_active_entry_ban_in_kingdom.name: subject_to_active_entry_ban_in_kingdom
subject_to_active_entry_ban_in_kingdom.description: The person is the subject of an entry ban in the Kingdom that has neither been lifted nor suspended.

subject_to_active_entry_ban_in_other_mem.name: subject_to_active_entry_ban_in_other_member_state
subject_to_active_entry_ban_in_other_mem.description: The person is the subject of an entry ban in another Member State that has neither been lifted nor suspended.

absconding_criterion_6_met.name: absconding_criterion_6_met
absconding_criterion_6_met.description: Absconding criterion 6 is met: the person submitted a new residence or international protection application immediately after a decision refusing entry or residence, terminating stay, or a refusal of entry or removal measure.

submitted_new_application_after_refusal_.name: submitted_new_application_after_refusal_or_removal
submitted_new_application_after_refusal_.description: The person submitted a new residence application or new application for international protection immediately after a decision refusing entry or residence, terminating stay, or a refusal of entry or removal measure.

absconding_criterion_7_met.name: absconding_criterion_7_met
absconding_criterion_7_met.description: Absconding criterion 7 is met: the person concealed having already provided fingerprints in another State bound by European regulations on determining the responsible State for examining an international protection application.

concealed_prior_fingerprints_in_other_st.name: concealed_prior_fingerprints_in_other_state
concealed_prior_fingerprints_in_other_st.description: While being questioned, the person concealed the fact that they had already provided their fingerprints in another State bound by European regulations on determining the responsible State for examining an international protection application.

absconding_criterion_8_met.name: absconding_criterion_8_met
absconding_criterion_8_met.description: Absconding criterion 8 is met: the person has submitted multiple international protection or residence applications in the Kingdom or other Member States that resulted in negative decisions or no residence permit.

submitted_multiple_protection_applicatio.name: submitted_multiple_protection_applications_with_negative_outcome
submitted_multiple_protection_applicatio.description: The person has submitted multiple applications for international protection in the Kingdom or in one or more other Member States that have given rise to a negative decision or have not resulted in the issuance of a residence permit.

submitted_multiple_residence_application.name: submitted_multiple_residence_applications_with_negative_outcome
submitted_multiple_residence_application.description: The person has submitted multiple residence applications in the Kingdom or in one or more other Member States that have given rise to a negative decision or have not resulted in the issuance of a residence permit.

absconding_criterion_9_met.name: absconding_criterion_9_met
absconding_criterion_9_met.description: Absconding criterion 9 is met: the person concealed having previously submitted an international protection application in another State bound by European regulations on determining the responsible State.

concealed_prior_protection_application_i.name: concealed_prior_protection_application_in_other_state
concealed_prior_protection_application_i.description: While being questioned, the person concealed the fact that they had previously already submitted an application for international protection in another State bound by European regulations on determining the responsible State for examining such an application.

absconding_criterion_10_met.name: absconding_criterion_10_met
absconding_criterion_10_met.description: Absconding criterion 10 is met: the person declared or it appears from their file that they came to the Kingdom for purposes other than those for which they submitted an international protection or residence application.

declared_purpose_inconsistent_with_appli.name: declared_purpose_inconsistent_with_application
declared_purpose_inconsistent_with_appli.description: The person has declared that they came to the Kingdom for purposes other than those for which they submitted an application for international protection or a residence application.

file_shows_purpose_inconsistent_with_app.name: file_shows_purpose_inconsistent_with_application
file_shows_purpose_inconsistent_with_app.description: It appears from the person's file that they came to the Kingdom for purposes other than those for which they submitted an application for international protection or a residence application.

absconding_criterion_11_met.name: absconding_criterion_11_met
absconding_criterion_11_met.description: Absconding criterion 11 is met: the person is subject to a fine for submitting a manifestly unlawful appeal to the Council for Alien Law Litigation.

subject_to_fine_for_manifestly_unlawful_.name: subject_to_fine_for_manifestly_unlawful_appeal
subject_to_fine_for_manifestly_unlawful_.description: The person is the subject of a fine because they submitted a manifestly unlawful appeal to the Council for Alien Law Litigation.

at_least_one_absconding_criterion_met.name: at_least_one_absconding_criterion_met
at_least_one_absconding_criterion_met.description: At least one of the objective absconding criteria (1 through 11) is met for the person.
